scripts.build:deploy: pnpm --filter @repo/db exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.migrate:deploy: pnpm --filter @repo/db exec prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.render:build: pnpm --filter @repo/db exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.render:migrate: pnpm --filter @repo/db exec prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prod:migrate: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --profile ops run --rm migrate
scripts.prod:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d postgres redis web worker caddy
scripts.prod:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml logs -f web worker
